building.evergreen-town.evergreen.blacks: The Blacksmith provides your army with Ballistas.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.capito: The Capitol provides 4000 gold per day.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.castle: The Castle adds two arrow towers to strengthen the town's defense and doubles the base growth rate of creatures.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.citade: The Citadel increases the base growth rate of creatures by 50% and strengthens the town's defensive structures.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.cityHa: The City Hall allows you to purchase town buildings and provides 2000 gold per day.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.dwelli: The Shack allows you to recruit Halflings.
Shack
The Cottage allows you to recruit Bonecrushers.
Cottage
The Belvedere allows you to recruit Fighters.
Belvedere
The Hive allows you to recruit Green Wasps.
Hive
The Ancient Altar allows you to recruit Silver Pegasi.
Ancient Altar
The Runic Circle allows you to recruit Green Shamans.
Runic Circle
The Mountain Lair allows you to recruit Mountain Blooded.
Mountain Lair
The Upgraded Shack allows you to recruit Brave Halflings.
Upgraded Shack
The Upgraded Cottage allows you to recruit Berserkers.
Upgraded Cottage
The Upgraded Belvedere allows you to recruit War-Maddened.
Upgraded Belvedere
The Upgraded Hive allows you to recruit Soldier Wasps.
Upgraded Hive
The Upgraded Ancient Altar allows you to recruit Silver Unicorns.
Upgraded Ancient Altar
The Upgraded Runic Circle allows you to recruit Great Shamans.
Upgraded Runic Circle
The Upgraded Mountain Lair allows you to recruit Ancient Blooded.
Upgraded Mountain Lair
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.fort.d: The Fort provides walls for your town.
The Crystal of Mystery increases weekly creature production by 50% and provides an additional 5000 gold per day for your kingdom.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.horde1: The Armory increases the weekly production of Bonecrushers and Berserkers by +6.
The Armory increases the weekly production of Bonecrushers and Berserkers by +6.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.mageGu: Visiting heroes can learn Level 1 spells in the Mage Guild.
Visiting heroes can learn Level 2 spells in the Mage Guild.
Visiting heroes can learn Level 3 spells in the Mage Guild.
Visiting heroes can learn Level 4 spells in the Mage Guild.
Visiting heroes can learn Level 5 spells in the Mage Guild.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.market: The Marketplace allows you to trade resources (the more Marketplaces you own, the better the prices).
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.resour: The Resource Silo provides +1 Crystal per day.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.specia: The Stonehenge temporarily doubles the maximum Mana of garrisoned or visiting heroes.
The Forest Hut increases the Power of every visiting hero by +1.
The Alliance Monument increases troop morale by +2 during a siege.
The Alliance Garden teaches new skills to visiting heroes (+1000 Experience), once per hero.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.tavern: The Tavern increases the morale of the garrison.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.townHa: The Town Hall allows you to purchase town buildings and provides 1000 gold per day.
building.evergreen-town.evergreen.villag: The Village Hall allows you to purchase town buildings and provides 500 gold per day.

Increases Attack and Defense of Silver Pegasi or Silver Unicorns after reaching level 5.

hero.evergreen-town.evbeledlen.specialty: Greatly increases the effect of Chain Lightning, depending on the level difference between hero and target (lower target level yields better effects).

hero.evergreen-town.evbrunn.specialty.de: Provides +1 Crystal per day to the kingdom.

Greatly increases the effect of Land Mine, depending on the level difference between hero and target (lower target level yields better effects).

hero.evergreen-town.evcraig.specialty.de: Receives a 5% extra bonus to Defense skill per level.
hero.evergreen-town.evdelin.name: Delin
hero.evergreen-town.evdelin.specialty.de: Increases Attack and Defense of Halflings or Brave Halflings after reaching level 1.
hero.evergreen-town.evdevek.name: Devek
hero.evergreen-town.evdevek.specialty.de: Receives a 5% extra bonus to Tactics skill per level.

hero.evergreen-town.evdriela.specialty.d: Receives a 5% extra bonus to Scouting skill per level.
hero.evergreen-town.evergreenRanin.name: Ranin
hero.evergreen-town.evergreenRanin.speci: Provides +350 gold per day to the kingdom.
hero.evergreen-town.evfasur.name: Fasur
hero.evergreen-town.evfasur.specialty.de: Increases Attack and Defense of Bonecrushers or Berserkers after reaching level 2.
hero.evergreen-town.evhignar.name: Hignar
hero.evergreen-town.evhignar.specialty.d: Greatly increases the effect of Shield.
hero.evergreen-town.evnarva.name: Narva
